generation_profile.global_negative_prompt: lowres, blurry, muddy colors, jpeg artifacts, watermark, logo, ui screenshot, poster text, subtitles, random letters, deformed eyes, extra fingers, extra limbs, bad anatomy, overexposed highlights

intro_card.intent: 开场引导句卡片，仪式感 + 哲思感
intro_card.positive_prompt: A cinematic mythic sky scene, giant cloud forms and deep blue atmosphere, one human figure suspended on a rope above clouds, philosophical epic mood, strong depth, clean center composition, no text
intro_card.negative_prompt: text overlay, logo, UI, cartoon, low detail
intro_card.composition_notes: 中心区域保留主标题空间，底部留字幕安全区。

concept_terms.positive_prompt: A glowing nightlife banquet scene with overflowing sensory pleasure, rich warm highlights, crowded but elegant composition, cinematic realism, no text
concept_terms.negative_prompt: cheap party poster look, readable signs, watermark

concept_terms.positive_prompt: Towering shopping bags and billboards surrounding a tiny person, dramatic perspective, bright commercial lights vs emotional emptiness, cinematic realism, no text
concept_terms.negative_prompt: brand logos readable, ad text, UI screenshot

concept_terms.positive_prompt: A lone figure standing in a vast dark landscape under collapsing stars, existential emptiness, high contrast, cinematic philosophical mood, no text
A person trapped in a geometric room of rulers, checklists, and symmetry, ultra-clean but oppressive, cinematic lighting, no text
concept_terms.negative_prompt: office infographic, readable checklist text, logo

concept_terms.positive_prompt: Urban rooftop with a solitary figure looking down on a chaotic city, cold detached mood, dramatic dusk light, cinematic realism, no text
A human silhouette integrated into clockwork and analytical grids, precision and efficiency atmosphere, cool metallic palette, cinematic realism, no text
concept_terms.negative_prompt: UI dashboard screenshot, visible numbers and words

concept_terms.positive_prompt: A giant balancing scale with crowds and outcomes, moral calculus visual metaphor, dramatic stage lighting, cinematic style, no text
A person at a cosmic crossroads under immense sky, intense self-choice moment, high contrast and painterly realism, no text
A calm figure standing in a storm while all debris flows around without moving the person, disciplined serenity, stable composition, restrained colors, cinematic realism, no text
concept_terms.negative_prompt: aggressive action pose, chaotic blur, readable text

concept_terms.positive_prompt: A clean desk by morning light, phone face down, notebook open, intentional digital boundaries, peaceful and clear, cinematic realism, no text
concept_terms.negative_prompt: visible app icons text, cluttered social media UI

body_scenes.positive_prompt: A central person overwhelmed by floating notifications and social gaze in a bright city environment, cinematic emotional pressure, subject clearly readable, no text
body_scenes.negative_prompt: actual app UI text, watermark, low contrast
body_scenes.composition_notes: 人物中景居中，底部 15% 保留字幕区。

body_scenes.positive_prompt: A wall of glowing screens around a thoughtful human silhouette, information overload metaphor, cool-blue cinematic palette, no text
Desk scene exploding with notification lights while a person tries to focus, cognitive fragmentation mood, dynamic but clear composition, no text
body_scenes.negative_prompt: comic effects text, emoji overlays, watermark

body_scenes.positive_prompt: Split composition: left side algorithmic chaos, right side calm ordered workspace with a composed person, clear dual semantics, cinematic realism, no text
body_scenes.negative_prompt: symmetric but semantically identical halves, readable labels

body_scenes.positive_prompt: Close-up of hand paused above phone unlock gesture, visible hesitation and deliberate breathing moment, cinematic shallow depth, no text
body_scenes.negative_prompt: actively tapping phone, readable phone text, logo

body_scenes.positive_prompt: Organized workspace with timer, notebook, and single task focus, disciplined calm productivity, bright natural light, cinematic realism, no text
body_scenes.negative_prompt: to-do list readable text, app screens, watermark

body_scenes.positive_prompt: Morning city with one calm walker in soft sunlight, regained control and emotional release, bright but restrained palette, cinematic realism, no text
body_scenes.negative_prompt: motivational poster words, overexposed sky, logo
